messages.content: I'm not your dad, immortal, I'm Jarvis, your AI assistant. I'm here to help you with any questions or tasks you need assistance with.
No need to apologize, immortal, I'm here to help and support you in any way I can. What's on your mind today?
I'll open YouTube for you, immortal. You should see your channel now, https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC7A5u12yVIZaCO_uXnNhc5g.
